title: Oldtimer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Update|[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]}}
'''Oldtimers''' were the descendants of prisoners sent to a [[Prison/Legends|penal colony]] on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]] in [[702 BBY]].

==History==
In [[702 BBY]], the [[Grissmath Dynasty]] formed a [[Prison/Legends|penal colony]] on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]]. The Grissmaths let loose [[Droch/Legends|drochs]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in an attempt to kill the prisoners, but it was unsuccessful. Eventually, the descendants of the prisoners became a tough, independent group of settlers called the 'Oldtimers'. Centuries later, a failed [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Beldorion]], came to Nam Chorios, and set himself up as a dictator. The response to his self-appointed dictatorship is unknown. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] was exiled to Nam Chorios by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and he filled the power void left by Beldorian's failure to keep the populace in check.

In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], the Oldtimers came into conflict with a newer group of settlers called the [[Newcomer]]s. [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tol Getelles|Getelles]], of the [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]], who had allied himself with Ashgad, had made a pact with Ashgad, who had been kept alive through [[Dzym|odd means]], to destroy the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]] by use of the [[Death Seed]] plague. The planet's native [[Tsil]]s were targeted by the Loronar for use in their [[synthdroid]]s and [[Needle fighter|CCIR Needles]]. However, the Oldtimers blocked them, and prohibited any kind of technology on Nam Chorios, lest the plague carrying drochs go offworld and spread the disease.

Unfortunately, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] blocked their efforts. Before the [[Battle of Nam Chorios]], Seti Ashgad had the planetary turbolaser gun station at [[Bleak Point]], under control of the Oldtimers, destroyed to allow safe passage into space where Getelles' fleet lay in orbit. Though Ashgad was killed by revolting fighters, Getelles stilled lived, and so the battle began. The Oldtimers allied themselves with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], while the Newcomers sided with Getelles. The Oldtimers came out victorious.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Conviction]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Conviction (audiobook)}}
